text:
Created attachment 145697
update from v1.4.2 to v1.5.0

The new version 1.5.0 has been released for audio/libsidplayfp.

Micro (patchlevel) update is committed on the library version number
as lib/libsidplayfp.so.3.0.11 to lib/libsidplayfp.so.3.0.12, though
lib/libstilview.so.0.0.1 does not changed.
